web.markdown:
[All Icons](https://lobehub.com/icons) Qwen

# Qwen (千问) Model Logos

## Download official Qwen icon, supporting React / SVG / PNG / WebP   [Official Site: https://huggingface.co/Qwen](https://huggingface.co/Qwen)

Download Icon

[GithubContribute on GitHub](https://github.com/lobehub/lobe-icons)

![Qwen (千问) Logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lobehub/lobe-icons/refs/heads/master/packages/static-png/light/qwen-color.png)

Various modes and formats for icon download are provided below. If you need CDN service, please refer to the following documentation: [CDN Usage](https://github.com/lobehub/lobe-icons#-cdn-usage)

## Qwen Logos React Components

I'm an Agent

I'm a Human

Send this prompt to your agent to use @lobehub/icons

```
Read https://lobehub.com/icons/skill.md and follow the instructions to use @lobehub/icons
```

Use the React icon package for more variant support, please refer to the following documentation: [@lobehub/icons](https://icons.lobehub.com/components/qwen)

Qwen

![QwenMono.tsx](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/react_ts.svg)

QwenMono.tsx

```
import { Qwen } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <Qwen size={56} />;
```

Qwen

![QwenColor.tsx](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/react_ts.svg)

QwenColor.tsx

```
import { Qwen } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <Qwen.Color size={56} />;
```

Qwen

![QwenText.tsx](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/react_ts.svg)

QwenText.tsx

```
import { Qwen } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <Qwen.Text size={56} />;
```

QwenQwen

![QwenCombine.tsx](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/react_ts.svg)

QwenCombine.tsx

```
import { Qwen } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <Qwen.Combine size={56} />;
```

QwenQwen

![QwenCombineColor.tsx](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/react_ts.svg)

QwenCombineColor.tsx

```

export default () => <Qwen.Combine size={56} type={'color'}/>;
```

Qwen

![QwenAvatar.tsx](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/react_ts.svg)

QwenAvatar.tsx

```
import { Qwen } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <Qwen.Avatar size={56} />;
```

Free Community Resources

# AI / LLM Model Icon Set
